# AutoCuts

> AutoCuts is an AI video editor built for talking-head creators. Upload one raw recording and get a polished long-form episode, captioned 9:16 shorts for TikTok / Instagram Reels / YouTube Shorts, and motion graphics — without scrubbing a timeline.

AutoCuts is most useful for YouTubers, podcasters, founders recording video newsletters, and anyone whose content is primarily one or two people talking to camera. It is not built for B-roll-heavy montages, music videos, or complex multi-camera narratives.

The product is free to try with 10 credits, no credit card required.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://autocuts.ai/): Product overview, what you get from one upload, FAQ
- [About](https://autocuts.ai/about/): Who AutoCuts is for, why we built it, how we work
- [Pricing](https://autocuts.ai/#pricing): Free with 10 credits, pay-as-you-go after

## Features

- [AI video editor for YouTubers](https://autocuts.ai/features/ai-video-editor-for-youtubers/): The core feature page for talking-head creators
- [AI video cleanup](https://autocuts.ai/features/ai-video-cleanup/): Automatic removal of filler words, dead air, and false starts
- [Turn long videos into shorts](https://autocuts.ai/features/turn-long-videos-into-shorts/): Generate captioned 9:16 vertical clips from a long recording
- [Add motion graphics to videos](https://autocuts.ai/features/add-motion-graphics-to-videos/): Automatic lower-thirds, number callouts, and charts

## Comparisons

- [AutoCuts vs CapCut](https://autocuts.ai/compare/autocuts-vs-capcut/): When each tool wins for YouTubers
- [AutoCuts vs OpusClip](https://autocuts.ai/compare/autocuts-vs-opusclip/): Full pipeline vs shorts-only clipping
- [AutoCuts vs Descript](https://autocuts.ai/compare/autocuts-vs-descript/): Cut-first AI vs transcript-first manual editing

## Library (long-form guides)

- [Best AI video editor for YouTubers in 2026](https://autocuts.ai/blog/best-ai-video-editor-for-youtubers/): Honest ranking of AutoCuts, Descript, OpusClip, CapCut, Vizard, Munch
- [How to turn a long video into shorts](https://autocuts.ai/blog/how-to-turn-long-videos-into-shorts/): Manual and AI workflows
- [How to add motion graphics without editing skills](https://autocuts.ai/blog/add-motion-graphics-without-editing-skills/): Which graphics earn their place
- [How to clean up YouTube videos faster](https://autocuts.ai/blog/clean-up-youtube-videos-faster/): Manual editing, Descript, and AI cleanup compared
- [Best CapCut alternative for talking videos](https://autocuts.ai/blog/best-capcut-alternative-for-talking-videos/): Honest breakdown for talking-head creators
